channel.title: Zowe — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Zowe (zowe).

item.title: CVE-2024-9802 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Conformance validation endpoint discloses detail about service to unauthenticated users
item.description: The conformance validation endpoint is public so everybody can verify the conformance of onboarded services. The response could contain specific information about the service, including available endpoints, and swagger. It could advise about the runn…

item.title: CVE-2024-9798 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Health endpoint offers list of onboarded services to unauthenticated users
item.description: The health endpoint is public so everybody can see a list of all services. It is potentially valuable information for attackers.

item.title: CVE-2024-6916 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Zowe CLI --show-inputs-only displays securely stored properties
item.description: A vulnerability in Zowe CLI allows local, privileged actors to display securely stored properties in cleartext within a terminal using the '--show-inputs-only' flag.

item.title: CVE-2024-6834 · 9 CRITICAL — Imperative Local Command Injection allows Activity Masking
item.description: A vulnerability in APIML Spring Cloud Gateway which leverages user privileges by unexpected signing proxied request by Zowe's client certificate. This allows access to a user to the endpoints requiring an internal client certificate without any crede…

item.title: CVE-2024-6833 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Zowe CLI Auto-Init Leaks Credentials Locally
item.description: A vulnerability in Zowe CLI allows local, privileged actors to store previously entered secure credentials in a plaintext file as part of an auto-init operation.

item.title: CVE-2021-4326 · 3.3 LOW — Imperative Local Command Injection allows Activity Masking
item.description: A vulnerability in Imperative framework which allows already-privileged local actors to execute arbitrary shell commands via plugin install/update commands, or maliciously formed environment variables. Impacts Zowe CLI.

item.title: CVE-2021-4314 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: It is possible to manipulate the JWT token without the knowledge of the JWT secret and authenticate without valid JWT token as any user. This is happening only in the situation when zOSMF doesn’t have the APAR PH12143 applied. This issue affects: 1.1…
